Convention audited against MMAudio source = identical to foley_cw's rectified-flow derivation (IdentitySToT, score=(t*v-x)/(1-t), no sign flip). first_diagnostic.command_summary: MMAudio Phase 0 STRICT: trajectory access + velocity->score SDE validation (alpha=0 AND nonzero-alpha) + dataset/anchor manifest + 3-part reliability gate. Emit GO_MAPS_PHASE / FIX_SCORE_CONVERSION / NO_TRAJECTORY_ACCESS / STOP_PROJECT.
